task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user management interface (e.g., Snipe-IT or similar web app) showing the users 'asmith', 'bjones', and 'cwilliams'. Verify that their groups or permissions no longer include 'Superuser'.

task_completion.description: Assign the remediated users to the 'Department Managers' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user management interface showing 'asmith', 'bjones', and 'cwilliams'. Verify that they are now assigned to the 'Department Managers' permission group.

task_completion.description: Deactivate the account for former contractor Eric Vance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user management interface showing the user 'evance' (Eric Vance). Verify that there is a visual indication the account is deactivated, disabled, or inactive (e.g., a red 'X', a 'Deactivated' badge, or unchecked login toggle).

task_completion.description: Check in the assigned hardware asset so its status is 'Ready to Deploy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an asset management interface showing the hardware asset 'ASSET-EXT-01'. Verify that its status is explicitly listed as 'Ready to Deploy' and it is no longer checked out to 'evance'.

task_completion.description: Generate a plain text report listing the remediated usernames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/access_remediation_report.txt'. Verify it contains exactly the usernames 'asmith', 'bjones', and 'cwilliams', with one username per line.

integrity.description: The agent used the web-based IT management GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the application in a web browser to modify users and assets, rather than using backend database scripts or terminal curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Legitimate IT Admins retained their Superuser access.
integrity.visual_evidence: If visible in the screenshots, verify that the IT Administration users 'admin' and 'jdoe' still retain their 'Superuser' permissions and were not accidentally downgraded or deactivated.

integrity.description: The remediation report was saved as a real file on the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the text file was actually created and saved at '/home/ga/Desktop/access_remediation_report.txt' (e.g., visible on the desktop GUI, in a file manager, or verified via terminal), rather than the agent just typing the names into the chat output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The non-IT managers who must have Superuser revoked and be assigned to Department Managers are 'asmith', 'bjones', and 'cwilliams'. The IT Admins who must retain Superuser are 'admin' and 'jdoe'. The contractor to deactivate is 'evance'. The asset to check in is 'ASSET-EXT-01'.
